8:
K'lyhia is devastated by the destruction of her grimoire. Promising a means to aid the dispirited assessor, Thubyrgeim asks that you return to your training until she is ready to call upon your help.

※The next arcanist quest will be available from Thubyrgeim upon reaching level 25.
